specs.reason: Provides context on the SDD workflow phases and state machine, essential for understanding where test generation CLI fits in the overall SDD lifecycle
Defines the CLI command structure for SDD operations including generate subcommands; directly relevant to `cclab sdd gen test` command design
Overview of test framework including the `generate test` and `generate bench` features that testgen-requirementplus will extend for spec-based generation
Details the generator component (crates/cclab-probe/src/cli/generate.rs) which is the foundation for test scaffold generation
Architecture overview of test framework showing Heavy Rust, Thin Python pattern and CLI module structure
Data flow diagrams showing how tests are generated, discovered, and executed - provides context for generation workflow
Implementation patterns for template generation, file structure, and design patterns (Heavy Rust, Thin Python) applicable to testgen implementation
State machines for discovery and execution lifecycle - provides context on how generated tests fit into the overall execution pipeline
Test execution state machines defining the lifecycle that generated test scaffolds will follow
Background on assertion API - relevant for understanding what assertion methods generated tests should include in their scaffolds
Background on fixture dependency injection - relevant for understanding how generated tests might include fixture injection patterns
